hooks.template: (insert item) (insert fact), (insert complete opposite item) (insert similar fact).
hooks.text: PayPal at 200 dollars is 9 bucks. PayPal at 20K is 880.

hooks.template: Here's exactly how much (insert action/item) you need to (insert result).
hooks.text: Here's exactly how much PayPal takes when a business owner pays a real factory.

hooks.template: (insert big result) from (insert item/thing). Here's how you can do it in X steps.
hooks.text: 2,300 dollars gone on one 20K supplier payment. Here's how PayPal does it.

hooks.template: If you're a (insert target audience) and you want (insert dream result) by (insert avenue), then listen to this video.
hooks.text: If you're a business owner paying China through PayPal, you need to hear this.
Stop using a t-shirt app to pay your 20K factory orders.
